images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese female model embodying a professional yoga instructor, captured from behind as she walks away from a poolside sunbed. She wears a daring, high-cut swimsuit in a soft pastel hue, the fabric sleek and form-fitting to accentuate her slim waist and curvy hips, with high leg openings revealing her long, toned legs. Her posture is elegant yet melancholic, one hand reaching back to casually fix her silky straight black hair, exposing the delicate curve of her neck. The setting is a luxurious, sun-drenched pool area with soft pastel tones, the background blurred into a creamy bokeh to focus entirely on her. She holds a champagne glass loosely in her other hand, the mood deep and contemplative despite the bright surroundings. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, the ring light reflection is visible in her eyes, with depth of field, ray tracing, and global illumination enhancing the flawless skin texture and vibrant clarity.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
